response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two songs. 2. Song 1: Title 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE' found in hashtag, Artist 'Hajimero' found on screen. Search: '"Koishiteru ZOMBIE" Kureiji Ollie Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Song 2: Title inferred from lyrics, Artist 'Hiiragi Magnetite' found on screen. Search: '"死のねがいしれね" lyrics'. 4. Lyrics were not successfully retrieved via web search, so null is returned. 5. Constructed final JSON based on findings.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Kureiji Ollie singing two songs with a dialogue interlude in between. The first song is "Koishiteru ZOMBIE" and the second is a duet performance.

scenes.description: Kureiji Ollie performs 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE'. The song title and artist credits appear on screen.
Kureiji Ollie and another character perform a duet. Text on screen indicates 'Lyrics, Music: Hiiragi Magnetite'.
